text_block_list.text:
It's a new day. I go looking for Agnes Digital to follow up, now that
she's had some time to think.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...You there. What are you doing, peeking into classrooms? Trying to
observe students in their natural habitat?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Jokes aside, circumstantial evidence suggests that you might
just be the "Horsegirl simp" trainer Digital mentioned.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh. Is that to say you really are the one, then? What a coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're looking for her, Digital left for the train station. She's
probably off in town buying Umamusume merchandise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. That trainer really has their sights set on Digital. She's run from
plenty of offers, but maybe... Hehe, I'm curious what she'll do.
I take Agnes Tachyon's tip and start searching likely stores.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hahaaah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Those sleek, supple leggies, framed so elegantly... by a luscious
green turf. ♪ Or these muscular legs, kicking up dirt with such
power...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If I was gonna pick just one photocard... But that'd be dumb!
Obviously two is better than one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaaagh, praise the heavens above! I'm so blessed to exist in the same
timeline as all these radiant racing goddesses!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's it—I was granted this time so that I could devote it to Umas! I
wasn't meant to run alongside them, and it was selfish of me to act so
parasocial!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh, wh-who just... said that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaagh?! F-fancy seeing you here. You didn't, uh, happen to
overhear all that, did you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Welp, you heard what you heard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I need you to know I'm dead serious! I mean, just think about it!
Who am I? Who?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm Agnes Digital! The biggest Umamusume enjoyer of all
Umamusu-kind!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think I could sacrifice my oshis?! Do you reeeally
expect me to pick just turf or dirt?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can't, I legit just can't, okay?! It's like telling someone to play mandolin without a pick just 'cause they can go pickless on guitar as if that's even remotely the same thing!
choice_data_list: So, you'd rather run in neither to watch both?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Exactly. I'm better off watching everything on live streams than lose out 'cause I got greedy with this irl nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I remember when I was little and saw a race on TV for the first time... It blew my mind!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The fierce determination they brought to the track. All the stories
behind their motivations! The way it wasn't all sunshine and
rainbows...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I saw true, pure resolve. And it seized my heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was so lucky to be an Umamusume myself. I thought I was
born to run like them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If the track is where Umas shine the brightest, then I wanted to be
there drinking it all in and cheering them on! I wanted to contribute
every way I could!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I knew when I enrolled that depending on which races I picked,
there'd be races I couldn't watch in person, but even so—I told myself
making that sacrifice was proof of my own resolve.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I steeled myself and entered Tracen. But when I took my first step on
campus...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"Kyaha," "Hehehe"... Everywhere I turn, there were Umamusume
giggling and smiling...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My oshis were physically right there. I was looking at my oshis irl in
full 3D... I could hear their breathing, their heartbeats, their
footsteps—and all in surround sound!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I finally understood... I was outside, looking at real Umas without a
monitor between us. And you know how I felt?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I just... I felt like my brain was gonna EXPLODE!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My illusions of resolve burst! Boom, gone! I wasn't prepared in the
slightest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The level of detail in real life is a billion times more than a screen! And then when you consider that I've got aptitude for dirt and turf—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I can't decide! I want to run them both so bad!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So I've made up my mind not to pick either. That's the most I can
possibly manage as a fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Got it? I'll never pick a side! I'll never run one if it means losing the
other!

Agnes Digital's gone full-on defensive, and it's pretty clear she's not
going to change her mind. But maybe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So what's it gonna be? Can you really afford to waste time trying to
convince me? Shouldn't you be off helping actual racers?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, looks like you can't argue with that, huh? Now, leave me
alone and—
choice_data_list: You've got more resolve than anyone!
You've got more resolve than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...I what?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Were you listening to any of what I just said? I can't even make one
entry-level decision.
choice_data_list: Because you've got the resolve not to!
Because you've got the resolve not to!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh?

Thinking back, Agnes Digital had a crazy amount of power on the dirt
track, especially for someone her size.

And then she turned around and showed incredibly light, precise
footwork on the turf.

She's been putting in double the work to hone both styles, so it'd be
a waste not to let that effort shine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um... You're gonna have to run whatever that was by me again...

It's a bit of a wild idea, but I think I've got a plan. I run it by her,
and...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WHAAAAAT?!
A few days later, the whole school's abuzz with rumors.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Did you hear the news? About Digital's tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! I can't believe her, though. I've never heard of
something like this before.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why is she running in both the dirt and the turf tryouts?
